description: Add comprehensive code documentation - JSDoc, README files, and inline comments for all critical files

userStories.title: Document Stripe webhook handler
userStories.description: Add JSDoc documentation to the Stripe webhook handler - critical payment path.
acceptanceCriteria: Add JSDoc to POST handler in src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts
Document each event handler function (checkout.session.completed, etc.)
Document helper functions with params and return types
Add inline comments explaining critical logic
userStories.notes: Added comprehensive JSDoc to all functions including file-level docs, fee structure, idempotency notes, and error handling documentation

userStories.title: Document Clerk webhook handler
userStories.description: Add JSDoc documentation to the Clerk webhook handler - user sync path.
acceptanceCriteria: Add JSDoc to POST handler in src/app/api/webhooks/clerk/route.ts
Add inline comments explaining webhook verification
userStories.notes: Added comprehensive JSDoc including file-level docs with security notes, POST handler with request flow and response codes, detailed inline comments for Svix signature verification, and documented each event handler (user.created, user.updated, user.deleted)

userStories.title: Document booking flow actions
userStories.description: Add JSDoc to all booking-related server actions.
userStories.notes: Added comprehensive JSDoc to all 3 booking flow action files including file-level @fileoverview, function docs with @param/@returns/@throws/@example, section dividers, and inline comments for critical logic

userStories.title: Document session management actions
userStories.description: Add JSDoc to session-related server actions.
userStories.notes: Documented 3 session action files: sessions/actions.ts (coach view - 10 functions), sessions/[id]/reschedule/actions.ts (client reschedule - 5 functions), and my-sessions/actions.ts (client view - 5 functions). Added file-level @fileoverview, section dividers, type documentation, and @param/@returns/@throws/@example for all functions.

userStories.title: Document availability actions
userStories.description: Add JSDoc to availability-related server actions.
userStories.notes: Documented 2 availability action files: dashboard/availability/actions.ts (coach settings - 3 functions + 3 types) and coaches/[slug]/availability-actions.ts (public display - 1 server action + 5 internal helpers). Added file-level @fileoverview, section dividers, type documentation, and @param/@returns/@throws/@example for all functions. Added inline comments for critical logic (buffer time, conflict detection, override priority).

userStories.title: Document onboarding components
userStories.description: Add JSDoc to coach onboarding form components.
acceptanceCriteria: Each component has JSDoc explaining purpose and props
userStories.notes: Documented all 4 onboarding form components with comprehensive JSDoc. Each file includes: file-level @fileoverview with flow/data/validation docs, interface documentation with @property tags, component JSDoc with @param/@returns/@example, section dividers, and inline comments for helper functions.

userStories.title: Document database schema
acceptanceCriteria: Add detailed comments to src/db/schema.ts explaining each table
Explain JSONB fields structure (sessionTypes, availability, etc.)
Document enum values and their meanings
Create src/db/README.md with schema overview and ERD description
userStories.notes: Added comprehensive JSDoc to schema.ts: file-level @fileoverview with ERD diagram, enum documentation with state transitions, JSONB interface docs (SessionType, BookingSessionType), table-level JSDoc with relationships and design decisions, field-level comments for all columns. Created src/db/README.md with ASCII ERD, tables overview, enum reference, JSONB structures, design decisions, and common query examples.

userStories.title: Document messaging system
userStories.notes: Documented 3 server action files (lib/conversations.ts, messages/actions.ts, messages/[id]/actions.ts) and 7 UI components (chat-view, conversations-list, conversation-row, message-bubble, message-input, message-button, chat-context-panel). Added file-level @fileoverview, interface docs, function JSDoc with @param/@returns/@example/@security, section dividers, and helper function documentation.

userStories.title: Document payment utilities
userStories.description: Add JSDoc to Stripe and payment utilities.
userStories.notes: Documented 2 payment utility files: stripe.ts (Stripe client configuration - env validation, client instance, publishable key utility, type exports) and refunds.ts (refund eligibility calculation - RefundEligibility interface, calculateRefundEligibility function, formatRefundAmount utility, getRefundMessage for UI). Added comprehensive error handling documentation with Stripe error types table and common error codes reference.

userStories.title: Document coach validators
acceptanceCriteria: Document each Zod schema with field explanations
userStories.notes: Added comprehensive JSDoc to coach-onboarding.ts: file-level @fileoverview with onboarding steps table, COACH_SPECIALTIES with usage/storage docs, all 4 schemas (coachBasicInfoSchema, coachBioSpecialtiesSchema, sessionTypeSchema, coachPricingSchema) with field tables/@example/@see, constants (SESSION_DURATIONS, SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES) with currency formatting examples, generateSlug helper with transformation rules. Emphasized CENTS storage convention throughout.

acceptanceCriteria: List all component folders with brief descriptions
